Release Checklist — entsoeapi

Source: RELEASE_CHECKLIST.md

1. Prepare

2. Documentation

3. Tests

4. R CMD CHECK

    • Common notes to fix before CRAN: LazyData without LazyDataCompression, missing \value in .Rd files

5. Merge & Tag

6. Pkgdown Site

7. (When ready) CRAN Submission

8. Announce
